job_description: LLM Trainer role. Required skills Large Language Model Artificial Intelligence Aiml JSON Ml Languages Training Intelligence. Experience level Associate. Employment type full time. Company Truetech Solutions. Location Remote. Job description Job Title LLM Trainer Experience 3+years Location Anywhere in the world Language Expert Any one of the Below Language French Italian German Spanish Chinese Japanese Korean Vietnamese Turkish Dutch Swedish Norwegian Danish Role Overview This position is within a project with one of the foundational LLM companies. The goal is to assist these foundational LLM companies in enhancing their Large Language Models. One way we help these companies improve their models is by providing them with high-quality proprietary data. This data serves two main purposes first as a basis for fine-tuning their models and second as an evaluation set to benchmark the performance of their models or competitor models. For example in the case of Agent Completion AC data generation your task will be to simulate high-quality multi-turn conversations between a user and a smart assistant that utilizes function-calling tools to accomplish user goals.
